author: zlipeng
abstract: Investigate any frontend view - page, route, Section/Tab, modal, drawer, Dashboard card, chart, filter form, list, or detail page - and summarize each functional module's displayed fields (label, value key, list column, filter item, metric) against the query API that feeds them. A generalization of the detail-page-only digest: it is not tied to detail/list pages. Core rules: only collect query endpoints (GET and query-style POST), never writes; always restore the real HTTP method + path from the service layer instead of showing the generated function name; pinpoint each field's true data source (a single module can span multiple APIs) and flag uncertainties; fully trace code->name mapping chains upstream (employee list, hardcoded enum, cascading region API, Zustand store, etc.); and pick the field schema per view type - list columns for list views, key+control+options for filter forms, metric+dimension for charts/cards. Workflow: confirm the view scope, fan out Explore/general-purpose subagents to read component source in parallel, restore endpoint addresses from services/, trace field sources and code->name chains, then emit structured Markdown - per-module tables (detail/form, list, filter, dashboard/chart) followed by a global query-endpoint summary table. Triggered when the user asks to survey a page/module's displayed content and data sources - '调研/汇总某页面的模块和接口' / '字段来自哪个接口' / '这些 code 怎么展示成名称' / '筛选条件调了哪些接口' / 'Dashboard 这个卡片的数据从哪来' - even without the word '汇总'.
